allow: PowerShell(try { \(Get-Command chromium-cli -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { "no chromium-cli" }; $edge = "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(Test-Path $edge\) { "edge found" } else { $edge2 = "C:\\Program Files\\Microsoft\\Edge\\Application\\msedge.exe"; if \(Test-Path $edge2\) { "edge found \(64\)" } else { "no edge" } }; try { \(Get-Command chrome -ErrorAction Stop\).Source } catch { $c="C:\\Program Files\\Google\\Chrome\\Application\\chrome.exe"; if \(Test-Path $c\) {"chrome found"} else {"no chrome"} })
Bash(timeout 30 bash -c 'until curl -sf http://localhost:5173/preview.html >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 1; done')
